name: Chocolate Dipped Peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over low heat, melt the Hershey's Milk Chocolate Bar and semisweet chocolate discs.
2. Place the saucepan in hot water to maintain the dipping consistency of the melted chocolate.
3. Dip several peanuts at a time into the melted chocolate.
4. Place the dipped peanuts into paper candy cups.
5. Repeat with remaining chocolate and peanuts.
6. Refrigerate until the chocolate sets, approximately 10 minutes.
7. Store covered in the refrigerator.
